since_last: 24% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.14%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 24% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.38% · BTC -0.50% · Gold -1.23% · Nasdaq100 -1.40%. 24% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.14%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.14%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.19%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: OKLO is the standout at -9.77%
cards.body: Leaders: INTU +5.27%, AVAV +5.06%, WDAY +3.31%, CRM +3.25%, ADBE +3.04%. Laggards: OKLO -9.77%, SMR -9.51%, SKHY -9.22%, CEVA -8.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.76% at $132.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.76% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
